plugins.name: clarify-first
plugins.description: A clarify-first skill that replaces plan mode by driving every ambiguity out of a request with one focused question at a time before producing a spec.

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Write or update a HANDOFF.md so the next agent with fresh context can continue this work. Sourced from ykdojo/claude-code-tips.

plugins.name: grill-me
plugins.description: Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design until reaching shared understanding, resolving each branch of the decision tree. Sourced from mattpocock/skills (MIT).

plugins.name: grill-with-docs
plugins.description: Grilling session that challenges your plan against the existing domain model, sharpens terminology, and updates documentation (CONTEXT.md, ADRs) inline as decisions crystallise. Sourced from mattpocock/skills (MIT).

plugins.name: tdd
plugins.description: Test-driven development with the red-green-refactor loop, driven by vertical slices (tracer bullets) and tests that verify behavior through public interfaces. Sourced from mattpocock/skills (MIT).

plugins.name: prd
plugins.description: Write a milestone PRD by grilling the user one question at a time (the /grill-me concept) through the decision tree — goal, user stories, scope, glossary terms, slice boundaries, acceptance checks — then writing an ordered checklist of independently-shippable executable slices to docs/prd/<slug>.md. Step 2 of the harness dev cycle.

plugins.name: harness-init
plugins.description: One-time, explicitly-invoked bootstrap that sets up or upgrades a project's agentic development harness: a thin CLAUDE.md that @imports coding guidelines, a PRD -> milestone-branch -> per-slice TDD -> review -> handoff dev cycle, an authoritative docs/glossary.md, and an ADR template (the PRD template is owned by the /prd skill). Idempotent.
